all_pictures_placed.pinyin: Suǒyǒu túpiàn dōu fàng hǎo le!

all_pictures_placed_verify_below.zh: 所有圖片都放好了 — 請在下面檢查！
all_pictures_placed_verify_below.pinyin: Suǒyǒu túpiàn dōu fàng hǎo le — qǐng zài xiàmiàn jiǎnchá!

all_scenes_practiced.pinyin: Suǒyǒu chǎngjǐng dōu liànxí wán le!

all_scenes_recorded_ready_to_submit.en: All scenes recorded — ready to submit
all_scenes_recorded_ready_to_submit.zh: 所有場景都錄好了 — 可以交了
all_scenes_recorded_ready_to_submit.pinyin: Suǒyǒu chǎngjǐng dōu lù hǎo le — kěyǐ jiāo le

all_tones_have_clear_shape_good_work.en: All tones have clear shape — good work.
all_tones_have_clear_shape_good_work.zh: 所有聲調形狀都很清楚 — 做得好。

all_vocabulary_words_used_excellent.zh: 所有詞彙都用到了 — 太棒了！
all_vocabulary_words_used_excellent.pinyin: Suǒyǒu cíhuì dōu yòngdào le — tài bàng le!

build_better_chinese_stories_with_pictur.en: Build better Chinese stories with picture prompts, voice recording, pronunciation feedback, and helpful language coaching.
build_better_chinese_stories_with_pictur.zh: 用圖片、錄音和老師的回饋，讓你的中文故事更好。
build_better_chinese_stories_with_pictur.pinyin: Yòng túpiàn, lùyīn hé lǎoshī de huíkuì, ràng nǐ de Zhōngwén gùshì gèng hǎo.

check_which_words_you_used.pinyin: Jiǎnchá nǐ yòng le nǎxiē cíhuì

click_a_scene_slot_above_to_place_this_p.en: Click a scene slot above to place this picture.
click_a_scene_slot_above_to_place_this_p.zh: 把這張圖片放到上面的場景位置。
click_a_scene_slot_above_to_place_this_p.pinyin: Bǎ zhè zhāng túpiàn fàng dào shàngmiàn de chǎngjǐng wèizhi.

complete_when_you_finish_all_images.en: You only complete your story when you finish recording all the images.
complete_when_you_finish_all_images.zh: 完成所有圖片的錄音後，你的故事才算完成。

create_story_based_on_images.en: Create your story based on the images below.
create_story_based_on_images.zh: 請根據下方的圖片創作你的故事。

complete_picture_based_story_tasks_recor.en: Complete picture-based story tasks, record Mandarin speech, and review Praat plus AI feedback.
complete_picture_based_story_tasks_recor.zh: 看圖片，錄普通話，看老師和 AI 的回饋。
complete_picture_based_story_tasks_recor.pinyin: Kàn túpiàn, lù Pǔtōnghuà, kàn lǎoshī hé AI de huíkuì.

dip_down_first_then_rise_back_the_lowest.en: Dip down first, then rise back — the lowest point matters most.
dip_down_first_then_rise_back_the_lowest.zh: 先降後升 — 最低點最重要。
dip_down_first_then_rise_back_the_lowest.pinyin: Xiān jiàng hòu shēng — zuì dī diǎn zuì zhòngyào.

drag_a_picture_to_a_slot_or_click_to_sel.en: Drag a picture to a slot, or click to select then click a slot.
drag_a_picture_to_a_slot_or_click_to_sel.zh: 把圖片拖到一個位置，或點一下選圖片，再點一下位置。
drag_a_picture_to_a_slot_or_click_to_sel.pinyin: Bǎ túpiàn tuō dào yí ge wèizhi, huò diǎn yíxià xuǎn túpiàn, zài diǎn yíxià wèizhi.

drag_each_picture_into_the_correct_scene.en: Drag each picture into the correct scene slot, then verify the sequence to unlock speaking practice.
drag_each_picture_into_the_correct_scene.zh: 把每張圖片拖到正確的場景位置，然後檢查順序，就可以開始口說練習。
drag_each_picture_into_the_correct_scene.pinyin: Bǎ měi zhāng túpiàn tuō dào zhèngquè de chǎngjǐng wèizhi, ránhòu jiǎnchá shùnxù, jiù kěyǐ kāishǐ kǒushuō liànxí.

for_each_image_record_and_see_feedback.en: For each image, record your voice and see the system feedback.
for_each_image_record_and_see_feedback.zh: 針對每一張圖片，你需要錄音並查看系統回饋。

speaking_model_sentence.en: Model sentence — look and practice saying it
speaking_model_sentence.zh: 範例句子 — 看著練習說說看
speaking_model_sentence.pinyin: Fànlì jùzi — kànzhe liànxí shuō shuō kàn

isolate_problem_characters_from_the_tone.en: Isolate problem characters from the Tone Drill panel and repeat them 5× before recording the full sentence.
isolate_problem_characters_from_the_tone.zh: 先在聲調練習找出有問題的字，多念 5 次，再錄完整句子。
isolate_problem_characters_from_the_tone.pinyin: Xiān zài shēngdiào liànxí zhǎochū yǒu wèntí de zì, duō niàn wǔ cì, zài lù wánzhěng jùzi.

keep_pitch_high_and_completely_flat_thro.en: Keep pitch high and completely flat throughout.
keep_pitch_high_and_completely_flat_thro.zh: 保持音高高，一直不要變。
keep_pitch_high_and_completely_flat_thro.pinyin: Bǎochí yīngāo gāo, yìzhí bú yào biàn.

keep_practicing_try_to_make_the_tone_sha.en: Keep practicing — try to make the tone shapes clearer.
keep_practicing_try_to_make_the_tone_sha.zh: 繼續練習 — 試著讓聲調形狀更清楚。
keep_practicing_try_to_make_the_tone_sha.pinyin: Jìxù liànxí — shìzhe ràng shēngdiào xíngzhuàng gèng qīngchu.

match_key_words_to_each_story_scene.en: Answer a few quick questions about the story's key words
match_key_words_to_each_story_scene.zh: 回答幾題故事重要詞彙的選擇題
match_key_words_to_each_story_scene.pinyin: Huídá jǐ tí gùshì zhòngyào cíhuì de xuǎnzétí

monitor_student_recordings_inspect_speec.en: Monitor student recordings, inspect speech metrics, and support narrative development.
monitor_student_recordings_inspect_speec.zh: 監控學生錄音、查看語音指標，並支援敘事發展。
monitor_student_recordings_inspect_speec.pinyin: Jiānkòng xuéshēng lùyīn, chákàn yǔyīn zhǐbiāo, bìng zhīyuán xùshì fāzhǎn.

need_teacher_help_prompt.en: Need help? Raise your hand here and your teacher will see it.
need_teacher_help_prompt.zh: 要老師幫忙嗎？在這裡舉手，老師會看到。
need_teacher_help_prompt.pinyin: Yào lǎoshī bāngmáng ma? Zài zhèlǐ jǔshǒu, lǎoshī huì kàndào.

needs_a_clear_pitch_contour_and_transcri.en: Needs a clear pitch contour and transcript. Try one complete sentence, or use Chinese/Taiwanese Whisper.
needs_a_clear_pitch_contour_and_transcri.zh: 需要清楚的音高曲線和逐字稿。試著說一個完整句子，或用中文／台語 Whisper。
needs_a_clear_pitch_contour_and_transcri.pinyin: Xūyào qīngchu de yīngāo qǔxiàn hé zhúzìgǎo. Shìzhe shuō yí ge wánzhěng jùzi, huò yòng Zhōngwén/Táiyǔ Whisper.

no_long_pauses_smooth_delivery.zh: 沒有長停頓 — 說得很順
no_long_pauses_smooth_delivery.pinyin: Méiyǒu cháng tíngdùn — shuō de hěn shùn

now_work_on_pronunciation_record_again_a.en: Now work on pronunciation — record again and focus on the tones. ↑
now_work_on_pronunciation_record_again_a.zh: 現在練習發音 — 再錄一次，注意聲調。↑
now_work_on_pronunciation_record_again_a.pinyin: Xiànzài liànxí fāyīn — zài lù yí cì, zhùyì shēngdiào. ↑

pitch_movement_estimated_for_each_mandar.en: Pitch movement estimated for each Mandarin character.
pitch_movement_estimated_for_each_mandar.zh: 這是每個普通話字的音高變化。
pitch_movement_estimated_for_each_mandar.pinyin: Zhè shì měi ge Pǔtōnghuà zì de yīngāo biànhuà.

practice_again_you_haven_t_used_all_the_.en: Practice again — you haven't used all the scene words yet
practice_again_you_haven_t_used_all_the_.zh: 再練習一次 — 你還沒使用所有場景詞彙

put_it_back_into_the_full_sentence_and_r.en: Put it back into the full sentence and record again.
put_it_back_into_the_full_sentence_and_r.zh: 放回完整句子並再次錄音。

put_the_story_pictures_in_the_right_orde.en: Put the story pictures in the right order
put_the_story_pictures_in_the_right_orde.zh: 把故事圖片排成正確順序

raise_your_hand_from_here_and_your_teach.en: Raise your hand here and your teacher will see it.
raise_your_hand_from_here_and_your_teach.zh: 在這裡舉手，老師會看到。
raise_your_hand_from_here_and_your_teach.pinyin: Zài zhèlǐ jǔshǒu, lǎoshī huì kàndào.

record_your_mandarin_story_out_loud.en: Record your Mandarin story out loud
record_your_mandarin_story_out_loud.zh: 把你的普通話故事大聲說出來，然後錄音
record_your_mandarin_story_out_loud.pinyin: Bǎ nǐ de Pǔtōnghuà gùshì dàshēng shuō chūlái, ránhòu lùyīn

review_pronunciation_and_language_feedba.pinyin: Kàn fāyīn hé yǔyán de huíkuì

select_a_real_situation_students_may_mee.en: Select a real situation students may meet in daily life, study the six connected picture cues, prepare useful Mandarin phrases, and record each cue for Praat prosody and Gemini language feedback.
select_a_real_situation_students_may_mee.zh: 選一個學生生活中可能遇到的真實情境，仔細看六張相連的圖片，準備實用的中文用語，然後為每張圖片錄音，取得 Praat 語調分析和 Gemini 語言回饋。
select_a_real_situation_students_may_mee.pinyin: Xuǎn yí ge xuéshēng shēnghuó zhōng kěnéng yùdào de zhēnshí qíngjìng, zǐxì kàn liù zhāng xiānglián de túpiàn, zhǔnbèi shíyòng de Zhōngwén yòngyǔ, ránhòu wèi měi zhāng túpiàn lùyīn, qǔdé Praat yǔdiào fēnxī hé Gemini yǔyán huíkuì.

start_as_high_as_you_can_and_drop_sharpl.en: Start as high as you can and drop sharply to the bottom.
start_as_high_as_you_can_and_drop_sharpl.zh: 從最高處開始，然後很快降到最低。
start_as_high_as_you_can_and_drop_sharpl.pinyin: Cóng zuì gāo chù kāishǐ, ránhòu hěn kuài jiàng dào zuì dī.

start_mid_push_pitch_up_to_the_top_like_.en: Start mid, push pitch up to the top — like asking a question.
start_mid_push_pitch_up_to_the_top_like_.zh: 從中間開始，把音高推到最高 — 像在問問題。
start_mid_push_pitch_up_to_the_top_like_.pinyin: Cóng zhōngjiān kāishǐ, bǎ yīngāo tuī dào zuì gāo — xiàng zài wèn wèntí.

stay_on_your_task_your_teacher_can_see_t.en: Keep practicing — your teacher has already seen this.
stay_on_your_task_your_teacher_can_see_t.zh: 請繼續練習，老師已經看到了。
stay_on_your_task_your_teacher_can_see_t.pinyin: Qǐng jìxù liànxí, lǎoshī yǐjīng kàndào le.

study_step_action_copy.en: Review the vocabulary and phrases below, then start speaking.
study_step_action_copy.zh: 看看下面的詞彙和短語，準備好了就開始錄音。
study_step_action_copy.pinyin: Kànkan xiàmiàn de cíhuì hé duǎnyǔ, zhǔnbèi hǎo le jiù kāishǐ lùyīn.

teacher_has_your_help_request.en: Your teacher saw you raise your hand
teacher_has_your_help_request.zh: 老師已經看到你舉手了
teacher_has_your_help_request.pinyin: Lǎoshī yǐjīng kàndào nǐ jǔshǒu le

tone_accuracy_score_shown_in_the_summary.en: Tone accuracy score shown in the summary above
tone_accuracy_score_shown_in_the_summary.zh: 聲調準確度分數在上面。
tone_accuracy_score_shown_in_the_summary.pinyin: Shēngdiào zhǔnquè dù fēnshù zài shàngmiàn.

too_fast_slow_each_tone.zh: 太快 — 放慢每個聲調
too_fast_slow_each_tone.pinyin: Tài kuài — fàngmàn měi ge shēngdiào

try_to_use_every_word_above_in_your_next.en: Try to use every word above in your next recording. ↑ Record again
try_to_use_every_word_above_in_your_next.zh: 試著在下一次錄音中使用上方每個詞彙。↑ 再錄一次

use_your_vocabulary_map_to_build_one_or_.en: Use your vocabulary map to build one or two sentences, then record.
use_your_vocabulary_map_to_build_one_or_.zh: 運用你的詞彙地圖造一兩個句子，然後錄音。

you_ve_completed_the_full_story_review_y.en: You've completed the full story. Review your recordings or record any scene again.
you_ve_completed_the_full_story_review_y.zh: 你已經說完整個故事了。可以聽你的錄音，或重錄任何一個場景。
you_ve_completed_the_full_story_review_y.pinyin: Nǐ yǐjīng shuō wán zhěng ge gùshì le. Kěyǐ tīng nǐ de lùyīn, huò chónglù rènhé yí ge chǎngjǐng.

your_teacher_will_create_and_publish_spe.en: Your teacher will make speaking practice activities. They'll show up here when ready.
your_teacher_will_create_and_publish_spe.zh: 你的老師會做一些口語練習活動，做好以後會出現在這裡。
your_teacher_will_create_and_publish_spe.pinyin: Nǐ de lǎoshī huì zuò yìxiē kǒuyǔ liànxí huódòng, zuò hǎo yǐhòu huì chūxiàn zài zhèlǐ.

your_teacher_will_publish_speaking_activ.en: Your teacher will put speaking practice activities here. Come back a bit later to check!
your_teacher_will_publish_speaking_activ.zh: 你的老師會把口語練習活動放在這裡。晚一點再來看看！
your_teacher_will_publish_speaking_activ.pinyin: Nǐ de lǎoshī huì bǎ kǒuyǔ liànxí huódòng fàng zài zhèlǐ. Wǎn yìdiǎn zài lái kànkàn!

your_transcript_will_appear_after_record.en: Your transcript will appear after recording.
your_transcript_will_appear_after_record.zh: 錄音後，你的逐字稿會出現。
your_transcript_will_appear_after_record.pinyin: Lùyīn hòu, nǐ de zhúzìgǎo huì chūxiàn.
